response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, leadership in AI-agent infrastructure, and exposure to MCP and cloud platforms, but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and formal AI/ML specialization — his background is more generalist with scattered AI exposure.
strengths: Demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Extensive cloud and full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and AWS
Proven ability to mentor, teach, and build developer tooling across teams
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architectures
Limited documentation of LLM optimization, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI), or AI evaluation pipelines
